nodes.title: NDC Standard Adoption
nodes.description: Airlines push direct distribution via NDC, threatening OTA intermediation.

branches.label: Embrace NDC
branches.description: Integrate NDC pipelines and offer rich airline content.

branches.label: Resist NDC
branches.description: Maintain legacy GDS relationships; risk content gaps.

nodes.title: AI Agent Gateway Decision
nodes.description: Decide whether to build proprietary AI travel agents or partner with platform providers.

branches.label: Build Proprietary AI
branches.description: Heavy R&D investment in in-house AI concierge capabilities.

branches.label: Partner with AI Platforms
branches.description: Integrate with major AI assistants as a travel fulfillment backend.

branches.label: Wait and See
branches.description: Minimal AI investment; focus on existing search/book model.

nodes.title: Airline Direct Booking Dominance Tipping Point
nodes.description: Airlines capture >50% of bookings direct; OTAs must redefine value proposition.

branches.label: Pivot to Complex Itineraries
branches.description: Focus on multi-city, multi-modal trips that airlines cannot serve directly.

branches.label: Become Aggregator Platform
branches.description: Transform into marketplace connecting travelers with suppliers via AI.

branches.label: Consolidate or Exit
branches.description: Merge with competitors or exit market due to margin compression.

strategic_profiles.name: Cost Leader
strategic_profiles.description: Optimizes operations for price-sensitive segments via scale and automation.

strategic_profiles.name: Differentiator
strategic_profiles.description: Invests heavily in AI-driven personalization and premium experiences.

strategic_profiles.name: Niche Search
strategic_profiles.description: Focuses on underserved routes and complex itineraries using proprietary technology.

nodes.description: Decide whether to build proprietary AI travel agents or partner with platform providers.

branches.label: Build Proprietary AI
branches.description: Heavy R&D investment in in-house AI concierge capabilities.

branches.label: Partner with AI Platforms
branches.description: Integrate with major AI assistants as a travel fulfillment backend.

branches.label: Wait and See
branches.description: Minimal AI investment; focus on existing search/book model.

nodes.title: Airline Direct Booking Dominance Tipping Point
nodes.description: Airlines capture >50% of bookings direct; OTAs must redefine value proposition.

branches.label: Pivot to Complex Itineraries
branches.description: Focus on multi-city, multi-modal trips that airlines cannot serve directly.

branches.label: Become Aggregator Platform
branches.description: Transform into marketplace connecting travelers with suppliers via AI.

branches.label: Consolidate or Exit
branches.description: Merge with competitors or exit market due to margin compression.

strategic_profiles.name: Cost Leader
strategic_profiles.description: Optimizes operations for price-sensitive segments via scale and automation.

strategic_profiles.name: Differentiator
strategic_profiles.description: Invests heavily in AI-driven personalization and premium experiences.

strategic_profiles.name: Niche Search
strategic_profiles.description: Focuses on underserved routes and complex itineraries using proprietary technology.
